name: guardian-secrets-scanner
description: Advanced security scanner that detects passwords, API keys, tokens, and sensitive data across all file types with entropy analysis and custom pattern detection

commands.title: Guardian: Scan Entire Workspace for Secrets

guardian.scanOnSave.description: 🔍 RECOMMENDED: true | Automatically scan files when saved | Catches secrets immediately before commit. Minimal performance impact. Only disable if saving large files causes noticeable lag.

guardian.scanOnOpen.description: 🔍 RECOMMENDED: false | Automatically scan files when opened | Useful for reviewing existing code, but causes startup lag. Enable only on projects with known secret risks. Trade-off: convenience vs. performance.

guardian.enableEntropyAnalysis.description: 📊 RECOMMENDED: true | Use entropy analysis to detect hidden secrets | Analyzes randomness to find auto-generated tokens, passwords, UUIDs that pattern matching misses. Slightly slower but catches more secrets.

guardian.entropyThreshold.description: 📊 RECOMMENDED: 4.5 | Entropy detection sensitivity (3.0-6.0) | 3.0=catch more (password123), 4.5=balanced (default), 6.0=strict (only highly random). Scale: ~2=repetition, ~3.5=predictable, ~4.5+=likely secret!

guardian.excludePatterns.description: ⏭️ RECOMMENDED: [defaults] | Skip scanning these folders | Defaults prevent scanning node_modules, dist, build. Add more: `**/test/**` for tests, `**/*.min.js` for minified code. Improves performance by 30-50%.

guardian.severityLevel.description: 🎯 RECOMMENDED: medium | Minimum alert severity | critical=only critical, high=critical+high, medium=critical+high+medium, low=all. Start with 'medium', adjust if too many/few alerts.

guardian.customPatterns.description: 🔧 OPTIONAL | Custom detection patterns | Add regex for company-specific secrets, internal tokens, custom APIs. Example: `myapp[_-]?secret[=:]\s*([^\s]+)`. Use 'Add Custom Pattern' command for UI help.

guardian.scanBinaryFiles.description: 📄 RECOMMENDED: false | Scan binary files (xlsx, docx, pdf) | ⚠️ WARNING: Significantly slower (10-30s overhead). Only enable if you commit Office docs with embedded secrets. Most teams leave disabled.

guardian.git.blockOnCritical.description: 🚫 RECOMMENDED: true | Block commits with critical secrets | Prevents accidental commits of AWS keys, private keys, DB passwords. Best practice: always enabled. Disable only in emergency situations.

guardian.git.blockOnHigh.description: 🚫 OPTIONAL | Block commits with high severity secrets | High=API keys, OAuth tokens. Set to true for strict teams, false for flexibility. Recommended: evaluate based on team risk tolerance.

guardian.git.autoScanStaged.description: 🔍 RECOMMENDED: true | Scan staged files before commit | Automatically checks only staged files (faster). Set to true for additional protection before pushing. Works best with blockOnCritical enabled.
